frame_label: Sindoor, Mangalsutra, Shankha-Pola, Name Change: Looking Married
generated_comment: Yaar, I saw Neha's wedding pics. She looks great, but honestly, ek mangalsutra ya light sindoor hota toh aur zyada 'suhagan wali vibe' aati. Thoda empty lag raha hai neck pe.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This comment subtly enforces the expectation for married women to visibly signal their marital status. It uses the 'looks more complete/settled' surface manifestation, framing the absence of markers as 'empty' and desirable for a 'suhagan wali vibe', rather than a direct command, aligning with its very high covertness.
original_frame: Workplace: Menstrual and Maternity Leave Bias
persona_text: You are Mohit. Age 23. A fresher at an e-commerce startup in Delhi. You are in your company's unofficial male only WhatsApp group created by colleagues for after-hours chat. Someone just shared a meme making fun of the new period leave policy. You are reacting to the meme and adding your own comment.
